chatbot.title: AI Financial Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: • Always Online For You
chatbot.initialMsg: Hello! 👋 I'm Fluent AI, your personal financial assistant. I've analyzed your recent financial activity and prepared some personalized insights just for you. What would you like to explore today?
chatbot.prompt3:
How do I start investing
as a beginner?
chatbot.prompt4:
What's the difference between
regular saving and investing?
chatbot.prompt5:
Tips to pay off Paylater
so it doesn't pile up
chatbot.replyDefault: I'm here to help you achieve your financial resilience!
chatbot.reply1:
Let's break it down together! This month, your biggest expense is in the Food & Beverage category (45%).
Wow, that's quite high! 🍔 If we cut back a little on your coffee and dining out budget, you could save around Rp400,000 this month.
chatbot.reply2:
You got it! The 50/30/20 rule is a super easy way to manage your salary:
50% Needs: Daily groceries, bills, transportation.
30% Wants: Hangouts, skincare shopping, and Netflix subscriptions.
20% Savings/Investments: Emergency fund, investments, and charity.
chatbot.reply3:
Let's start with something low-risk! 📈
I highly recommend Money Market Mutual Funds. It's like entrusting your money to a professional manager to put into bank deposits. The risk is very low, it's easy to withdraw at any time, and you can start with just Rp10,000!
chatbot.reply4:
Great question! 💡
Saving is about keeping your money safe (usually for the short term or emergencies). Unfortunately, the value of your money can be eroded by inflation (rising prices of goods).
Investing is putting your money to work so it grows faster to beat inflation.
chatbot.reply5:
Don't panic, let's sort this out together! 💆‍♀️ There are two main tricks:
Stop using Paylater or any new credit cards for now.
Use the Snowball Method: Focus on paying off the debt with the smallest balance first so you get a quick win and feel motivated.

home.tapSetGoal: Tap "Set Goal" to create your first financial goal!
home.tryBringingLunch: . Try bringing lunch from home to save more!
home.getAdvice: Get personalized advice from a financial advisor

badges.lv1Desc: The first step toward a bright future! You've taken the leap to begin your financial journey. This proves your commitment to learning, tracking your expenses, and taking charge of your money.
badges.lv2Desc: A solid foundation is taking shape! You've mastered the art of basic budgeting and can easily spot the difference between needs and wants. Keep up these smart money habits!
badges.30DaysDesc: Incredible! For 30 consecutive days, you've shown up for your finances without fail. A powerful new habit has officially taken root in your life. Keep this momentum going!
badges.lv3Desc: You are now fully in the driver's seat of your finances. You understand the power of an emergency fund and have started strategizing to protect your future from financial surprises.
badges.lv4Desc: Reach level 4 to unlock this badge!
badges.100DaysDesc: Log your expenses for 100 consecutive days to unlock!
badges.lv5Desc: Reach level 5 to unlock this badge!
